title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 19–19 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #10 as the dwarves of Green Bit draw Usopp and Robin into their rebellion, believing Usopp is the legendary hero who will save them.
